There's an invisible force field between you and your creative ambitions—a digital glass ceiling that's been quietly limiting your potential while you blame your schedule, focus, or discipline.

I call bullshit.

8544.advanced_seo_description: AI isn't neutral magic — it's a political weapon forged in Silicon Valley. On data as the new land, algorithms as settlers, and who feeds the machine.
8544.jetpack_publicize_message: Data is the new land, algorithms the settlers, and we’re the unpaid labor. Every “free” tool mines our creativity for corporate empires, selling our own reflections back to us. AI isn’t neutral—it’s power-coded. Unless we rewrite the rules, we’re just passengers in someone else’s history.
